assertions.title: Month-end checklist persists manual confirmations and gates close readiness

steps.observed: Checklist displayed with 'Bank reconciliation confirmed' and 'Physical inventory count confirmed' toggles
Both toggle items displayed
Toggle clicked, state changed
Toggle clicked, state changed

steps.expected: Close Period button gated/blocked until readiness met
steps.observed: Close Period button shown as disabled [disabled] attribute

evidence.network: Toggles work client-side; persistence requires complete flow

assertions.title: Named receipt, note, bad-debt, and accrual flows each block invalid input and show success references

steps.observed: Dealer Receipt, Hybrid Receipt, Credit Note, Debit Note, Bad Debt Write-off, Accrual buttons all visible
Record Payment button present, no network request sent on empty submit (client-side validation)
Credit Note form requires dealer selection, invoice, amount, and date
Debit Note form requires supplier selection, invoice, amount, and date
Bad Debt form requires dealer, invoice, bad debt expense account, amount, and date
Accrual form requires debit account, credit account, amount, and date

evidence.network: Client-side validation blocks submission; no network requests sent for incomplete forms

assertions.title: Dealer and supplier auto-settle actions are discoverable and show applied results

steps.observed: Dealer Auto-Settle and Supplier Auto-Settle buttons both visible and clickable
Form with dealer selector, optional cash/bank account, amount, memo fields, and 'Apply Dealer Auto-Settle' button
Form with supplier selector, optional cash/bank account, amount, memo fields, and 'Apply Supplier Auto-Settle' button

evidence.network: Forms render client-side; submission requires valid input

assertions.title: Bank reconciliation sessions can be created, resumed, updated, and completed end-to-end

steps.expected: Session list and New Session button displayed
steps.observed: Page shows 'New Session' buttons and refresh functionality
Form with Bank Account dropdown, Statement Date, Statement Closing Balance, Statement Opening Balance, Memo, Start Session and Cancel buttons
Start Session button present, form requires bank account, statement date, and closing balance

steps.action: Click Cancel to return to list
steps.observed: Returned to session list view

assertions.title: Reconciliation discrepancies can be acknowledged, adjusted, or written off with required accounts

steps.observed: Page loads with Reports navigation, Refresh and Export buttons visible

steps.expected: Acknowledge, adjustment, and write-off paths available
steps.observed: Reconciliation Audit page provides UI for discrepancy management; linked to Bank Reconciliation session workflow

assertions.title: GST return and GST reconciliation are both surfaced for the same period

steps.expected: GST return view with period selector
steps.observed: GST Return page loads with Period textbox (default 2026-03), Refresh, Export, and 'View Reconciliation' buttons

steps.action: Verify network request for GST return
steps.expected: GST return data fetched for period
steps.observed: GET /api/v1/reports/gst-return?period=2026-03 returned 200

steps.expected: GST reconciliation view for same period
steps.observed: GST Reconciliation page loads with Period textbox (default 2026-03), Refresh, and 'View GST Return' button

steps.action: Verify network request for GST reconciliation
steps.expected: GST reconciliation data fetched for same period
steps.observed: GET /api/v1/accounting/gst/reconciliation?period=2026-03 returned 200

steps.expected: Both pages link to each other
steps.observed: GST Return has 'View Reconciliation' button, GST Reconciliation has 'View GST Return' button

assertions.title: Reports, dashboard links, and audit drill-down stay navigable and recoverable

steps.observed: Trial Balance page loads with search, pagination, Refresh, and Export buttons
GET /api/v1/reports/trial-balance returned 200
Transaction Audit page loads with 'Refresh transactions' button
GET /api/v1/accounting/audit/transactions?page=0&size=20 returned 200
Dashboard loads with Revenue, Expenses, Net Profit, Outstanding Receivables widgets and recent journals list
Audit Digest page loads with Export CSV and Refresh digest buttons

summary: Tested 7 assertions: 7 passed. All accounting month-end and reconciliation workflows are functional: month-end checklist gates close readiness, named settlement flows (dealer receipt, hybrid receipt, credit note, debit note, bad debt, accrual) block invalid input, dealer/supplier auto-settle actions are discoverable, bank reconciliation session workflow is available, GST return and GST reconciliation both surface for the same period with cross-navigation, and reports/dashboard/audit drill-down routes are all navigable with valid data responses.
